title: Android Engineer II
reason: The candidate is a strong engineer with some Android exposure and Java/C++/backend/CV depth, but lacks credible production Android Kotlin experience, modern Android architecture, and Android-first shipping history required for this role.

title: Applied AI Engineer
reason: Strong Python, production automation, API/backend, testing, and AI engineering experience fit the builder profile, but the resume lacks direct LLM API, agent deployment, prompt/tool-use, Slack/HubSpot/Snowflake, and production AI monitoring experience central to this role.

title: Product Data Analyst
reason: The candidate has strong Python/ML and some product-adjacent analytical instincts, but the role is a senior product data analyst position requiring owned A/B testing, advanced SQL/Snowflake, telemetry, funnel/cohort analysis, and roadmap decision experience that are mostly absent from the resume.
